docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BYRNE, JAMES AS TO RESPONDENT AVILA, JOAQUIN HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 807990
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-17-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM & ORDER FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2004 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT JOAQUIN AVILA AND AGAINST APPELLANT JAMES BYRNE. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (WED., 17NOV2004, D-525).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT AVILA, JOAQUIN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BYRNE, JAMES $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $322.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT MR. JOAQUIN AVILA APPEARS this day for Trial de Novo; there is NO APPEARANCE by or for APPELLANT MR. JAMES BYRNE; the Court informs Respondent AVILA that he will allow additional time for the arrival and appearance of APPELLANT MR. JAMES BYRNE this day, to no avail; thereupon, the Court takes the matter under submission; Mr. Joaquin Avila is advised through his previously-sworn Spanish Language Interpreter Ana Herrera that he will be notified of the Court's decision by mail. PRO TEM JUDGE: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: Marjorie L. Manzella; NOT REPORTED (Wed., 17NOV2004, d-525).
